---
title: "Jan/Feb Goals + Dailies"
author: "Megan Ewing"
date: "01-05-2026"
categories: goals, daily
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
editor: visual
---

## January/Febrary Goals

-   Finish revisions on Ch 2 (clam chapter)

-   Develop a more concrete plan for bypass project

## Daily Updates

Okay so I've been not great at the daily updates for January or perhaps even febrary, but here's my toggle reports for the first couple weeks of february (I had to record 'free time' uses for a week for an assignment in my consulting class so feel free to ignore that):

![](data:image/png;base64,)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

the 13th-16th I was on a ski trip at stevens for a buddy's birthday – snow was surprisingly good! got a few inches over the weekend

![](images/Screenshot%202026-02-24%20at%203.55.03%20PM.png)

270 guest lecture slides available as their own notebook post

the 20th-22nd I was on a fishing trip down in Tillamook for some winter steelhead. Got skunked :/
